stamp.title: US Scott #24 Benjamin Franklin 1c Blue (Type V)
stamp.summary: 1857 issue, 1c Blue Benjamin Franklin, perforated, Type V (with side ornaments and top/bottom scrolls trimmed). This specimen shows a bright, fresh blue color. Centering is Fine-Very Fine.

stamp.title: US Scott #24 Benjamin Franklin 1c Blue (Type V)
stamp.summary: 1857 issue, 1c Blue Benjamin Franklin, perforated, Type V. Shows a duller or more grayish-blue shade compared to the left example. Centering is Fine, shifted to the left.
